description: Pluggable design-mode slot for prompt-driven brand, UI, and landing-page direction.

fields.name: promptSource
fields.description: Relative path to the Markdown prompt source that drives this design mode.

fields.name: artifactMode
fields.description: The primary artifact shape, such as brand brief, landing-page system, or UI direction pack.

fields.name: voice
fields.description: The intended writing voice for copy and creative direction.

fields.name: brandFocus
fields.description: The core brand and interface territories this design mode should emphasize.

fields.name: deliverables
fields.description: The concrete outputs the design mode should aim to produce in the first pass.

fields.name: experiencePrinciples
fields.description: High-level principles that guide the look, feel, and product expression.

fields.name: antiPatterns
fields.description: Patterns the design mode should actively avoid.
